name: playwright-enterprise-framework
description: Enterprise-grade Playwright Hybrid POM Automation Framework with TypeScript
author: QA Automation Team

scripts.allure:generate: mkdir -p allure-results && cp executor.json environment.properties allure-results/ && npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report
scripts.allure:serve: mkdir -p allure-results && cp executor.json environment.properties allure-results/ && npx allure serve allure-results
scripts.allure:allure report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:serve
scripts.allure:generate2: npx playwright test && npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && allure serve allure-report
